title: Bump bundled krunkit from 1.1.0 to 1.1.1
body:
Bump bundled krunkit to 1.1.1. This is a minor, expedited release to fix a library linking problem.

Fixes: #27427

```release-note
Bump bundled krunkit version to 1.1.1 in the macos installer.
```
